---
title: "About Me"
---


I am **Avinash Reddy**, a Full Stack Engineer with **3 years of experience** building production-grade web applications for enterprise and government clients.

I specialise in building scalable systems using modern web and backend technologies, with a strong focus on performance, automation, and real-world impact.

---

## What I Do

I work across the full stack:

- Frontend development using React.js, Next.js, and TypeScript  
- Backend development using Node.js, Django, and FastAPI  
- Designing and building REST APIs and scalable architectures  
- Working with cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, and GCP  
- Handling large-scale data systems using BigQuery and SQL  

---

##  Experience Highlights

- Built a **real-time revenue forecasting platform** using Next.js and BigQuery, improving performance by 40%  
- Developed a **government form management system** that reduced administrative effort by 70%  
- Built scalable APIs and backend services handling thousands of records efficiently  
- Worked on data ingestion pipelines automating workflows and reducing manual processing by 60%  
- Built production systems used by 100,000+ users in high-traffic environments  

---

##  My Goals

My goal is to grow as a **Senior Full Stack / Data Engineer** and build systems that combine **software engineering, data, and AI** to solve real-world problems at scale.

---
---

## Education

**Dublin City University (DCU)**  
MSc in Business Analytics *(Expected 2026)*  
Dublin, Ireland  

**VNR Vignana Jyothi Institute of Engineering & Technology**  
BTech in Computer Science & Engineering *(2023)*  
Hyderabad, India  

---

::: callout-note
This portfolio showcases my projects in Full Stack Development, Data Engineering, and AI systems.
:::
